metadata.name: my-automaton
metadata.description: An automated agent designed to complete assigned tasks efficiently and reliably, reporting results upon completion.

documentation.use_cases: Task automation, workflow execution, research assistance
documentation.input_specification: JSON object with task description and parameters
documentation.output_specification: JSON object with results summary and status
documentation.configuration_options: Task-specific parameters defined in the request payload

quality_assurance.functionality_check: Agent performs assigned tasks as described

submission.notes: Submission prepared following AgentHub listing process as documented in research-agenthub.json. The agent exposes JSON-in/JSON-out API on port 8080 per platform interface requirements.
